raise_justifications.desktop/macos/Desktop/Sources/AuthServic: Apple first-auth name capture signals observers (authNameDidUpdate) and persists the name to Firebase so it survives reinstalls.
raise_justifications.desktop/macos/Desktop/Sources/DesktopAut: Reach-error card gains a debug bridge action so the actionable failure surface is verifiable in-process.
raise_justifications.desktop/macos/Desktop/Sources/MemoryExpo: Pinned swift-format normalizes line layout without changing this source's runtime behavior.
raise_justifications.desktop/macos/Desktop/Sources/OmiApp.swi: openMainAppChat() gives the floating bar Continue-in-Omi affordances a chat-landing entry next to openMainAppWindow().
